title: Set up Firebase Authentication in a Next.js app
summary: Full Firebase Auth setup — SDK initialization, email/password + Google OAuth providers, session cookies via Firebase Admin SDK, and protected routes.
declaration: I will set up Firebase Authentication in your Next.js app with email/password and Google sign-in. This uses the Firebase client SDK for login and Firebase Admin SDK for secure server-side session verification. If you prefer Auth.js, Clerk, or Lucia, say so before I begin.
